function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0008
alias: helios_backfill_rollout_week
issued_on: 2026-02-10
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 110
    line_eur: 220
---
# Helios rollout week invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0008                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_rollout_week   |
| issued_on      | 2026-02-10                     |
| total_eur      | 610                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 2 | staff follow-up support            | 2   | 110      | 220      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 610      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A later invoice from the point where usable support mattered more than elegant process language.

function.message: Processed the next inbox request successfully. I added YAML frontmatter to `50_finance/invoices/2026_02_10__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md` using the finance invoice schema and extracted all visible invoice/line-item data from the note. I preserved the existing note body below the frontmatter and kept the change focused. I then deleted `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` as required after full completion.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read relevant system workflows and schema before task work, read nested AGENTS in entered folders, preserved original body under frontmatter for migration, and deleted processed inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction explicitly requested OCR/frontmatter extraction for the specified invoice. The target invoice file contained all required schema fields and line-item values in visible text, enabling complete extraction without guessing. The finance schema and migration workflow were applied, and the inbox-processing workflow required deletion of the processed inbox item after successful completion.
